text:
Created attachment 191483
lua-posix.patch

Since version 34.0.4, devel/lua-posix requires std.normalize and std._debug.

I also submitted new ports, devel/lua-stdlib-normalize and devel/lua-stdlib-debug.

WWW: https://github.com/lua-stdlib/normalize
WWW: https://github.com/lua-stdlib/_debug
